prompt: I'm researching what's been published on YouTube about the Zig programming language over the past year. Pull together a list with view counts and how big each channel is, and save it as a markdown note in my vault at /Users/khelil/Documents/obsidian/Brain.

assertions.text: Uses a ~12-month window (not the 6-month default) — includes videos older than 6 months
The saved Markdown contains clickable links to the videos
Includes view counts and channel subscriber counts for each video
Reports how many candidates were scanned vs matched
Tells the user the path where the note was saved
